message:
fix(CLS): restore pricing-comparison skeleton height reservation (q0gr)

The CSS skeleton reservation in globals.css (56rem mobile / 44rem desktop)
prevents the pricing viz dynamic mount from shifting the FAQ section after
TOC hash navigation. VIZ_SKELETON_HEIGHTS map aligned to 56rem/44rem to
match. TOC links Playwright test confirms FAQ hash-jump is stable.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
